Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields to extract the full text content from every running ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the entire active ad inventory in one pull, ensuring no running ad is missed during compliance or brand safety reviews.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes all extracted ad copy to identify and flag any instances of specific target phrases, noting the exact field and copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: What would take a human hours of manual reading across dozens of ads is completed in seconds with precise field-level attribution — removing the risk of missed matches.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged report listing every ad where a target phrase was found, including the specific field and exact copy for each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: The recipient gets an immediately actionable report with full context — no digging, no guesswork — enabling fast review, escalation, or ad pausing decisions.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 53 agents total, with 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the update front this week, the overall pipeline continues to represent a significant body of work actively driving value across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, sales automation, and more. Stay tuned for more movement in the weeks ahead as our in-progress agents push toward completion!
